goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 12:30'.
The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 12:30
The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park
